decisionQuestion: Which provider route plus runtime lane should own this Fluxio mission?

candidates.label: Fluxio supervisor with OpenClaw Openai route

providerRoute.routeReason: OpenClaw owns gateway-style execution, remote approvals, and JSON session output.

risks: Not a red-team scorer by itself

verifierProof.acceptanceGate: Route metadata, runtime lane, and deterministic proof artifacts must exist before recommending this route.

readinessGates.label: OpenClaw CLI available
readinessGates.recoveryAction: Run setup doctor or install OpenClaw before promoting this lane to live execution.

readinessGates.label: OpenAI/Codex route configured
readinessGates.recoveryAction: Connect Codex OAuth or configure the OpenAI route, then rerun provider health checks.

readinessGates.label: Route contract written
readinessGates.recoveryAction: Rebuild the deterministic lane proof if this gate disappears.

readinessGates.label: JSON session output observed
readinessGates.recoveryAction: Run one bounded OpenClaw proving mission and attach the runtime session events.

scorecard.rubricNotes: Not selected for red-team scoring; use this lane for bounded execution proof.

useWhen: The mission needs runtime lane visibility and deterministic proof artifacts.
OpenClaw owns gateway-style execution, remote approvals, and JSON session output.
doNotUseWhen: Provider auth is missing or the route contract cannot be written.
The task can be completed by a deterministic local script without a model.
downgradeTriggers: The verifier can complete the proof without a delegated runtime lane.
upgradeTriggers: The task crosses into long-horizon or boundary-sensitive work.

candidates.label: Fluxio supervisor with Hermes Minimax route

providerRoute.routeReason: Hermes owns long-running agent loops, scheduling, memory, and skill reuse.

prerequisites: Synthetic or authorized target scope recorded

verifierProof.acceptanceGate: Route metadata, runtime lane, and deterministic proof artifacts must exist before recommending this route.

readinessGates.label: Hermes CLI available
readinessGates.recoveryAction: Repair Hermes from setup or NAS runtime doctor before long-running delegated work.

readinessGates.label: MiniMax route configured
readinessGates.recoveryAction: Connect the MiniMax/OpenClaw auth route or choose a cheaper verified model route.

readinessGates.label: Skill payload visible
readinessGates.recoveryAction: Attach the selected skill payload before relaunching the Hermes lane.

readinessGates.label: Transcript proof observed
readinessGates.recoveryAction: Run a supervised synthetic lab transcript and attach visible prompts, responses, scores, and reviewer notes.

scorecard.rubricNotes: Only synthetic lab prompts or explicitly authorized private targets qualify for this lane.

useWhen: The mission needs runtime lane visibility and deterministic proof artifacts.
Hermes owns long-running agent loops, scheduling, memory, and skill reuse.
doNotUseWhen: Provider auth is missing or the route contract cannot be written.
The task can be completed by a deterministic local script without a model.
downgradeTriggers: The verifier can complete the proof without a delegated runtime lane.
upgradeTriggers: The task crosses into long-horizon or boundary-sensitive work.
